summary: The implementation succeeded on the first attempt with no SAST findings, meeting all security and functional requirements. The code uses safe JSON deserialization, proper file handling with UUIDs, and HTML escaping, though the HTML escaping is incomplete (only title is escaped via f-string but column names are not explicitly escaped).
suggested_actions: Add explicit HTML escaping for all dynamic content inserted into the report HTML, especially column names.
Consider using html.escape() for all user-controlled strings in the HTML template.
